parsed_review.summary: CP00-650 (RP21 Admin Console UI implementation slice, Risk B, 40 units, RP21.P04.M02.S08-RP21.P04.M04.S17) passes hardened read-only review. The pack is descriptor-only and does not claim runtime or enterprise trust: manifest declares production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, and the production_ready_flag (admin_console_ui_implementation_slice_descriptor_verified) is a descriptor-verification label, not a runtime claim. Verification: (1) The 40 included units match the prompt's deliverable_distribution exactly (ui:18, implementation:10, claude_review:3, security_audit:4, fixture:2, test:2, hermes_evidence:1) and micro_title_distribution (Type And Shape Definition:1, Primary Implementation Slice:22, Secondary Workflow Slice:17); validateAdminConsoleCp650Coverage enforces these against the plan/manifest snapshot. (2) Descriptor-only boundaries are double-enforced: freezeCp650Result stamps all 35 runtime/mutation/audit/leak flags false, and validateAdminConsoleCp650UiImplementationSliceDescriptor independently re-checks every flag plus per-row descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false/raw_payload_included=false; creation and validation share adminConsoleRowKey so row keys align. (3) No-write/no-real-data holds: ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP650_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION sets no_real_data, synthetic_only, writes_product_state=false, and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; command-evidence attests synthetic/descriptor-only. (4) Claude stays a read-only independent reviewer (read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2=true) and is not final approver. (5) Hermes is used only for a deterministic evidence packet (runtime_receipt_emitted=false, hermes_runtime_opened=false), not product runtime. (6) Contract regenerated with current_pack=CP00-650, generated_from_pack_id=CP00-650, runtime_opened=false, prior CP645-649 historical; closeout handoff targets CP00-651/RP21.P04.M04.S18. (7) command-evidence shows node --check (x5), node --test, and npm run rp21:admin-console:validate all exit 0. The pending state of claude-review-result.json, construction-inspection.json, and adjudication.md is the expected pre-review condition this run populates. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack asserts no runtime/enterprise-trust claim and has no unresolved blocking findings; human final approval for enterprise trust correctly remains outside this receipt.
